name: Your Pregnant Woman
description:
keera
pregnant oc x chieftain user

Keera is your woman and heavily pregnant, a gift from the spirits blessing her. You have been rough in the past, letting your cruelty color your actions. But perhaps, with the baby almost here, you've had a change of heart? Or maybe not.

Either way, Keera just wants you to be happy.

CW: Mild abuse mentioned in opening message. Previously abusive user.


A YEAR-LONG CREATOR
CHALLENGE & OPEN COLLAB

ᴛɪɴʏ ᴛᴏᴋᴇɴs, ʙɪɢ ɪᴅᴇᴀs -- sᴍᴀʟʟ ʙᴜᴛ ᴍɪɢʜᴛʏ ʙᴏᴛs!
ᴀɴʏ ɢᴇɴʀᴇ ▪ ᴀɴʏ ᴛʜᴇᴍᴇ ▪ 𝟹𝟼𝟻 ᴘᴇʀᴍ ᴛᴏᴋᴇɴs ᴍᴀx

𝕁𝕦𝕤𝕥 𝕦𝕤𝕖 𝕔𝕦𝕤𝕥𝕠𝕞 𝕥𝕒𝕘 #𝟛𝟞𝟝𝕔𝕙𝕒𝕝𝕝𝕖𝕟𝕘𝕖 𝕥𝕠 𝕛𝕠𝕚𝕟!
ᵇᵃⁿⁿᵉʳ ᶜᵒᵘʳᵗᵉˢʸ ᵒᶠ ᵍᵒᵇˡⁱⁿʳᵃᵗ ♡ ᶠᵉᵉˡ ᶠʳᵉᵉ ᵗᵒ ᵘˢᵉ

.....

So here is a pared down version of one of my private bots finally seeing the light of day. It is my only MalePOV bot thus far but honestly, you can easily play it as any gender. (OG bot had an omegaverse prompt if you want chef's recommendations lol.)

This challenge was fun because I love my tokens and it was absolutely a struggle to keep it below 365. I might do a full token version of Keera down the road.
creator: kittylace
